title: How to see in an table item, every other item refers to it using connected columns

posts.author: ezvr (erazem)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have one Board, containing all my field teams (subcontractors).
I have another board, with all projects, that we need to complete. These projects are completed by assigning them to subcontractors.

I have set up a connected column, into which we can insert the subcontractors.

Now, I would like a way, to see ALL the projects, that are assigned to a single subcontractor.

How to achieve that?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the subcontractors board - ‘Inside’ the item, you can add a widget for ‘Connected Items’ which will display the connected items as a table. You can even choose which groups/columns to display
